data.title: Neural correlates of flow state in elite athletes during high-pressure performance

data.abstract: fMRI during a high-pressure perceptual-motor task revealed reduced default mode network activity and elevated dorsolateral prefrontal engagement in flow-state reports.
data.journal: Journal of Sport and Exercise Psychology
data.title: Neural correlates of flow state in elite athletes during high-pressure performance
